Home / Services / Tile Flooring Installation

Tile Flooring Installation

Durable, waterproof, and stylish tile flooring for any room.

Tile flooring is a versatile and durable option for bathrooms, kitchens, and other high-moisture areas in Miami homes. VOGUE Parquet® specializes in the expert installation of ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone tile. We offer a wide range of tile sizes, shapes, colors, and patterns to create a unique and personalized look. Our installation process begins with careful subfloor preparation and waterproofing to prevent leaks and water damage. We use high-quality thin-set mortar and grout to ensure a strong and durable bond. Our skilled installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, spacing, and grout lines. Tile flooring is resistant to water, stains, and scratches, making it easy to clean and maintain. Tile is especially popular in Miami homes because it is resistant to mold and mildew. With proper installation and maintenance, tile flooring can provide decades of beauty and performance.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design consultation and material selection.
  2. 02 Step 2: Subfloor preparation and waterproofing.
  3. 03 Step 3: Precise tile installation with expert craftsmanship.
  4. 04 Step 4: Grouting, sealing, and final inspection.

Benefits

  • Waterproof and stain-resistant
  • Durable and long-lasting
  • Easy to clean and maintain
  • Wide variety of styles and patterns

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of tile is best for a bathroom?

Porcelain tile is generally recommended for bathrooms due to its water resistance and durability.

How often should tile grout be sealed?

Tile grout should be sealed every 1-2 years to prevent staining and water damage.

Can tile be installed over existing floors?

In many cases, yes, but the existing floor must be structurally sound and properly prepared.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with tile flooring installation? Contact us today.
